{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Orange District
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Orange District]] is a district in [[Elysia]] where one earns powers like levitation and flight by demonstrating loyalty.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Orange District]] is a location in [[Elysia]] that allows for flight.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
